headline: Semis still in command: MU +15.8% catalyst holds, desk adds ACHC + LRCX; TECH +19.8% on 11x volume

market_state.line: QQQ +0.59%, SPY flat, VXX stress 0.97 — vol suppressed, semis driving; tape favors momentum longs into close.

actions.line: Post-earnings HBM/DRAM surge — durable thesis, signal warns extension; half size.
Clean risk_on setup, low risk severity, tight stop; research neutral keeps it half size.
Semi-equipment rides MU wave; split verdict (signal yes, research says noise) + fading 5d momentum → quarter only.

watch.line: Medium-confidence ripple from MU — heavy HBM/DRAM equipment exposure, capex pull-forward not priced.
+19.8% on 11.2x rel volume, overbought flags — watch for fade or vol exhaustion.
+18.8%, MACD bullish, but sub-2x rel vol — semi sympathy play, needs volume confirmation.
Low-confidence MU ripple — ion implant memory fab exposure, small-cap leveraged memory capex bet.
-11.3% on 4.4x rel volume — unusual sell-side pressure, worth monitoring for continuation.

changed: Desk rotated out: CWAN, QCOM, TMO dropped; ACHC and LRCX added as new takes.
TECH emerged as top mover at +19.8% on 11x volume — not in prior scan.
MU carry-through confirmed; QCOM no longer in top movers leadership.
caveats: RTH scan as of 15:08 ET — prices 52 min from close, levels may shift materially into the bell.
MU and semi-ripple plays (AMAT, ACLS) are extended intraday; chasing into close carries gap-fill risk overnight.
